ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio or description of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "two_factor_auth_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption of the post */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image associated with the post */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location tag of the post */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the post (e.g., public, followers only) */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  "removed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was removed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the like is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "removed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was removed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow relationship was created */,
  "removed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow relationship was removed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the follow relationship is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approve, delete, flag) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moderation action was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_moderation_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_moderation_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., like, comment, follow) */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "actioned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was actioned */,
  "actioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who actioned the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_actioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("actioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose settings are being stored */,
  "private_account" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's account is private */,
  "allow_comments" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if comments are allowed on the user's posts */,
  "allow_messages" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if messages can be sent to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the settings were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the settings were last updated */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tag association is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
